nasb.text: For whoever does the will of My Father who is in heaven, he is My brother and sister and mother.”

esv.text: For whoever does the will of my Father in heaven is my brother and sister and mother.”

cnv.text: 凡是遵行我天父旨意的，就是我的弟兄、姊妹和母親了。”

ccb.text: 凡遵行我天父旨意的人都是我的弟兄、姊妹和母亲。”

csbs.text: 因为凡是遵行我天父旨意的人，他才是我的弟兄、姐妹和母亲。”
